label: CT + overuse / inappropriate / low-value / unnecessary
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("overutilization"[tiab] OR "overuse"[tiab] OR "inappropriate"[tiab] OR "low-value"[tiab] OR "unnecessary"[tiab])

label: CT + appropriateness / Choosing Wisely
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("appropriateness"[tiab] OR "appropriate use"[tiab] OR "Choosing Wisely"[tiab])

label: CT + diagnostic yield / low yield / number-needed-to-scan
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("diagnostic yield"[tiab] OR "low yield"[tiab] OR "number needed to scan"[tiab] OR "number needed to image"[tiab] OR "incremental yield"[tiab])

label: CT + incidental findings / incidentaloma / overdiagnosis
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("incidental finding"[tiab] OR "incidental findings"[tiab] OR "incidentaloma"[tiab] OR "overdiagnosis"[tiab])

label: CT + cumulative / recurrent / repeated dose

label: CT + net / marginal / incremental clinical benefit
